swimlaneLegend.internal-dev-only: VICE oracle, drive-only debug, scenario fixtures, legacy variants

e2eLegend.E2E-G: Operator tools are not workflow tools

rows.name: agent_advance_phase
rows.useWhen: Advanced agent/phase orchestration used inside a real RE project workspace.
rows.notFor: Casual use outside a C64RE project workspace.

rows.name: agent_freeze_artifact
rows.useWhen: Advanced agent/phase orchestration used inside a real RE project workspace.
rows.notFor: Casual use outside a C64RE project workspace.

rows.name: agent_onboard
rows.useWhen: First call in any session: detect a new vs resumed project and load persistent project memory.
rows.notFor: Mid-task knowledge writes — use save_finding / agent_record_step.

rows.name: agent_propose_next
rows.useWhen: Get a ranked next-action proposal from current project + phase state.
rows.notFor: Per-artifact phase moves — use the advanced phase tools.

rows.name: agent_record_step
rows.useWhen: After every substantive step, persist what was done + propose the next branch.
rows.notFor: Storing analysis facts — use save_finding.

rows.name: agent_set_role
rows.useWhen: Mark whether you operate as analyst, cartographer or implementer for this work.
rows.notFor: Choosing a workflow profile — use start_re_workflow.

rows.name: agent_next_step
rows.useWhen: Ask the server for the single next product step (+ branch alternatives) derived from real project state — the orchestrated 'what do I do now?'.
rows.notFor: Running the step — use agent_run_step or the named product tool; recording progress — use agent_record_step.

rows.name: agent_run_step
rows.useWhen: Run a workflow step from agent_next_step: executes the inventory/media-sync step in-process and points at the product tool for every other step.
rows.notFor: Choosing the step — use agent_next_step; calling internal maintenance helpers — they are wrapped behind product facades.

rows.name: analyze_g64_anomalies
rows.useWhen: Detect raw-track anomalies (weak bits, long tracks, killer tracks) signalling copy protection.
rows.notFor: Normal directory read — use inspect_disk.

rows.name: analyze_prg
rows.useWhen: Run the 9-analyzer heuristic pass over a PRG to find code/data/assets.
rows.notFor: Producing assembly text — use disasm_prg.

rows.name: apply_patch_recipe
rows.useWhen: Advanced change/patch-recipe + loader-event bookkeeping.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — record conclusions via save_finding.

rows.name: archive_phase1_noise
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: assemble_source
rows.useWhen: Assemble ASM (KickAss/64tass) to verify a byte-identical rebuild.
rows.notFor: Disassembly — use disasm_prg.

rows.name: auto_resolve_questions
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: auto_tag_relevance
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: backfill_finding_address_ranges
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: backfill_internal_flags
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: backfill_manifest_payload_hashes
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: backfill_payload_content_hashes
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: backfill_question_address_ranges
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: build_all_views
rows.useWhen: Regenerate every human view model for the project.
rows.notFor: One specific view — use the targeted build_* tool.

rows.name: build_annotated_listing_view
rows.useWhen: Render the annotated disassembly listing view.
rows.notFor: Raw disasm text — use disasm_prg.

rows.name: build_cartridge_layout_view
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: build_disk_layout_view
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: build_flow_graph_view
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: build_load_sequence_view
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: build_memory_map
rows.useWhen: Build the project memory-map view.
rows.notFor: Annotated listing — use build_annotated_listing_view.

rows.name: build_project_dashboard
rows.useWhen: Build/refresh the project dashboard view after inventory or findings change.
rows.notFor: Memory map — use build_memory_map.

rows.name: build_tools
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: bulk_create_cart_chunk_payloads
rows.useWhen: After extract_crt, promote useful cartridge bank/slot chunks into payload entities for analysis.
rows.notFor: Single-chunk linking — use link_cart_chunk_to_asm.

rows.name: bulk_import_analysis_reports
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: c64re_whats_next
rows.useWhen: Ask the server for the next sensible action when unsure where to continue.
rows.notFor: Recording a completed step — use agent_record_step.

rows.name: c64ref_build_rom_knowledge
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: c64ref_lookup
rows.useWhen: Look up a KERNAL/BASIC/hardware address or symbol meaning.
rows.notFor: Resolving a runtime PC to source — use runtime_resolve_pc.

rows.name: close_completed_tasks
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: compare_exomizer_shared_encoding_sets
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: confirm_question_resolution
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: declare_loader_entrypoint
rows.useWhen: Advanced change/patch-recipe + loader-event bookkeeping.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — record conclusions via save_finding.

rows.name: dedupe_artifact_registry
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: dedupe_payload_entities
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: define_runtime_scenario
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: depack_bwc_bitstream
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: depack_bwc_chunk
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: depack_bwc_raw
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: depack_byteboozer
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: depack_byteboozer_lykia
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: depack_exomizer_raw
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: depack_exomizer_sfx
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: depack_rle
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: diff_scenario_runs
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: disasm_menu
rows.useWhen: Disassemble a specific menu/region with chosen entry points.
rows.notFor: Whole-PRG disasm — use disasm_prg.

rows.name: disasm_prg
rows.useWhen: Disassemble a PRG to ASM; pass 2 consumes executed-PC evidence + annotations.
rows.notFor: Heuristic-only scan — use analyze_prg.

rows.name: disk_sector_allocation
rows.useWhen: Map BAM/sector allocation of a disk image.
rows.notFor: File extraction — use extract_disk.

rows.name: export_menu
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: extract_crt
rows.useWhen: Extract banks/chips from a .crt cartridge into project artifacts.
rows.notFor: Live cartridge boot — use runtime_session_start / runtime_media_mount.

rows.name: extract_disk
rows.useWhen: Extract files/payloads from a disk image into project artifacts.
rows.notFor: Just listing the directory — use inspect_disk.

rows.name: extract_disk_custom_lut
rows.useWhen: Extract a payload using a custom sector LUT (non-DOS loader layout).
rows.notFor: Standard DOS files — use extract_disk.

rows.name: extract_g64_raw_track
rows.useWhen: Extract a whole raw GCR track image for custom-loader / protection analysis.
rows.notFor: Per-sector decode — use extract_g64_sectors.

rows.name: extract_g64_sectors
rows.useWhen: Extract decoded raw sectors from a G64 track into project artifacts.
rows.notFor: A whole raw track image — use extract_g64_raw_track.

rows.name: get_artifact_lineage
rows.useWhen: Trace an artifact's version lineage / derivation.
rows.notFor: Listing all artifacts — use list_artifacts.

rows.name: get_project_profile
rows.useWhen: Read the active project's profile / objective / workflow selection.
rows.notFor: Mutating the profile — use start_re_workflow.

rows.name: import_analysis_report
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: import_annotations_as_findings
rows.useWhen: Promote annotation routine docs into durable findings.
rows.notFor: Drafting annotations — use propose_annotations.

rows.name: import_manifest_artifact
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: inspect_address_range
rows.useWhen: Inspect a byte/address range of a payload statically.
rows.notFor: Live memory — use runtime_monitor_memory.

rows.name: inspect_disk
rows.useWhen: Inspect a .d64/.g64 directory + layout from any absolute/project path.
rows.notFor: Extracting payloads — use extract_disk.

rows.name: inspect_g64_blocks
rows.useWhen: Decode the GCR block layout of a raw G64 track.
rows.notFor: Sync gaps only — use inspect_g64_syncs.

rows.name: inspect_g64_syncs
rows.useWhen: Inspect sync marks / gaps in a raw G64 track.
rows.notFor: Block decode — use inspect_g64_blocks.

rows.name: inspect_g64_track
rows.useWhen: Inspect one raw G64 (half-)track's GCR/sync structure.
rows.notFor: DOS file listing — use inspect_disk.

rows.name: link_cart_chunk_to_asm
rows.useWhen: Link a cartridge chunk payload to its best ASM/TASS artifact.
rows.notFor: Promoting chunks to payloads — use bulk_create_cart_chunk_payloads.

rows.name: link_entities
rows.useWhen: Relate two project entities (e.g. asset → producing routine).
rows.notFor: Linking a payload to code — use link_payload_to_asm.

rows.name: link_payload_to_asm
rows.useWhen: Link a payload/byte range to its disassembly + evidence.
rows.notFor: Linking two entities — use link_entities.

rows.name: link_payload_to_runtime
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: list_anti_patterns
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: list_artifacts
rows.useWhen: List tracked artifacts (media, payloads, disasm, views).
rows.notFor: Reading one artifact's content — use read_artifact.

rows.name: list_build_pipelines
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: list_container_entries
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: list_entities
rows.useWhen: List project entities (routines, assets, structures).
rows.notFor: Creating an entity — use save_entity.

rows.name: list_findings
rows.useWhen: Review recorded findings for the project.
rows.notFor: Creating a finding — use save_finding.

rows.name: list_flows
rows.useWhen: List recorded control/loader flows.
rows.notFor: Building a memory map — use build_memory_map.

rows.name: list_g64_slots
rows.useWhen: List the half-track slots present in a .g64 image before deeper raw inspection.
rows.notFor: Decoded DOS directory — use inspect_disk.

rows.name: list_loader_entrypoints
rows.useWhen: Advanced change/patch-recipe + loader-event bookkeeping.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — record conclusions via save_finding.

rows.name: list_loader_events
rows.useWhen: Advanced change/patch-recipe + loader-event bookkeeping.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — record conclusions via save_finding.

rows.name: list_open_questions
rows.useWhen: Review unresolved open questions.
rows.notFor: Asking a new question — use save_open_question.

rows.name: list_patch_recipes
rows.useWhen: Advanced change/patch-recipe + loader-event bookkeeping.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — record conclusions via save_finding.

rows.name: list_payloads
rows.useWhen: List executable payloads discovered in media.
rows.notFor: Disassembling one payload — use disasm_prg.

rows.name: list_project_artifacts
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: list_relations
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: list_runtime_scenarios
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: list_tasks
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: mark_segment_rejected
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: pack_bwc_raw

rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: pack_exomizer_sfx

rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: pack_exomizer_shared_encoding

rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: pack_rle
rows.useWhen: Advanced packer/depacker codec helper for a specific compression format.
rows.notFor: Normal depack workflow — use suggest_depacker + try_depack.

rows.name: pointer_report
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: project_audit
rows.useWhen: Advanced project init/maintenance operation.
rows.notFor: Per-artifact analysis — use the analysis/disasm tools.

rows.name: project_checkpoint
rows.useWhen: Advanced project init/maintenance operation.
rows.notFor: Per-artifact analysis — use the analysis/disasm tools.

rows.name: project_init
rows.useWhen: Initialize a fresh directory as a C64RE project before any knowledge write — the product entry step for a new project.
rows.notFor: Resuming an existing project — use agent_onboard; choosing a workflow — use start_re_workflow.

rows.name: project_inventory_sync
rows.useWhen: Sync the project store with disk: register present-but-untracked files (media, payloads, sidecars, generated + hand-written source), import manifests, and rebuild every view. Run after extraction/disassembly/import or when onboarding/audit reports unregistered files or stale views.
rows.notFor: Creating a project — use project_init; extracting bytes from media — use extract_disk / extract_crt.

rows.name: project_repair
rows.useWhen: Advanced project init/maintenance operation.
rows.notFor: Per-artifact analysis — use the analysis/disasm tools.

rows.name: project_status
rows.useWhen: Report whether the directory is a project and summarise its state.
rows.notFor: Listing individual artifacts — use list_artifacts.

rows.name: propose_annotations
rows.useWhen: Write a draft annotation set (labels/segments/routine docs) for review.
rows.notFor: Applying + rebuilding — use disasm_prg with annotations.

rows.name: propose_question_resolutions
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: ram_report
rows.useWhen: Read the project's RAM-usage hypotheses report.
rows.notFor: Live memory reads — use runtime_monitor_memory.

rows.name: read_artifact
rows.useWhen: Read the content of a tracked artifact by id/path.
rows.notFor: Raw disk/CRT inspection — use inspect_disk / extract_crt.

rows.name: read_g64_sector_candidate
rows.useWhen: Read the decoded bytes of one candidate sector found by a header scan.
rows.notFor: Bulk raw extraction — use extract_g64_sectors.

rows.name: reconstruct_lut
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: record_build_step_result
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: record_cart_chunk_packer
rows.useWhen: Record packer/format metadata for a cartridge chunk.
rows.notFor: Linking ASM — use link_cart_chunk_to_asm.

rows.name: record_file_packer
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: record_loader_event
rows.useWhen: Advanced change/patch-recipe + loader-event bookkeeping.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — record conclusions via save_finding.

rows.name: record_runtime_event_summary
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: render_docs
rows.useWhen: Render project documentation/report outputs.
rows.notFor: Building interactive views — use build_all_views.

rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: run_payload_reverse_workflow
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: run_prg_reverse_workflow
rows.useWhen: Run the end-to-end per-PRG analyze→disasm→verify workflow.
rows.notFor: Project-level workflow selection — use start_re_workflow.

rows.name: runtime_batch_results
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.name: runtime_batch_status
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.

rows.name: runtime_diff_snapshots
rows.useWhen: Legacy pre-facade variant; retained only for backward-compat tooling.
rows.notFor: New work — the Spec 725/726 default facade supersedes it.

rows.name: runtime_drive_persist_writes
rows.useWhen: Advanced drive-only debugging of the 1541 CPU/mechanics in isolation.
rows.notFor: Normal disk loading — mount via runtime_media_mount and run the real drive.

rows.name: runtime_drive_session_load_vsf
rows.useWhen: Advanced drive-only debugging of the 1541 CPU/mechanics in isolation.
rows.notFor: Normal disk loading — mount via runtime_media_mount and run the real drive.

rows.name: runtime_drive_status
rows.useWhen: Advanced drive-only debugging of the 1541 CPU/mechanics in isolation.
rows.notFor: Normal disk loading — mount via runtime_media_mount and run the real drive.

rows.name: runtime_export_audio
rows.useWhen: Advanced: export audio/video/frame artifacts from a session.
rows.notFor: Normal screen evidence — use runtime_render_screen.

rows.name: runtime_export_screenshot
rows.useWhen: Advanced: export audio/video/frame artifacts from a session.
rows.notFor: Normal screen evidence — use runtime_render_screen.

rows.name: runtime_export_video
rows.useWhen: Advanced: export audio/video/frame artifacts from a session.
rows.notFor: Normal screen evidence — use runtime_render_screen.

rows.name: runtime_follow_path
rows.useWhen: Follow a pointer/path of accesses through the trace.
rows.notFor: Taint propagation — use runtime_trace_taint.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: runtime_iec_bus_state
rows.useWhen: Legacy pre-facade variant; retained only for backward-compat tooling.
rows.notFor: New work — the Spec 725/726 default facade supersedes it.

rows.name: runtime_input_load_config
rows.useWhen: Advanced: configure input/keymap for a session.
rows.notFor: Sending input — use runtime_type / runtime_joystick.

rows.name: runtime_input_load_vicerc
rows.useWhen: Advanced: configure input/keymap for a session.
rows.notFor: Sending input — use runtime_type / runtime_joystick.

rows.name: runtime_input_save_config
rows.useWhen: Advanced: configure input/keymap for a session.
rows.notFor: Sending input — use runtime_type / runtime_joystick.

rows.name: runtime_joystick
rows.useWhen: Send joystick direction/fire into the live machine.
rows.notFor: Keyboard — use runtime_type.

rows.name: runtime_load_prg
rows.useWhen: Load a .prg into RAM (load) or load+run (inject-run) in the live session.
rows.notFor: Disk mount — use runtime_media_mount.

rows.name: runtime_load_vsf
rows.useWhen: Legacy pre-facade variant; retained only for backward-compat tooling.
rows.notFor: New work — the Spec 725/726 default facade supersedes it.

rows.name: runtime_mark
rows.useWhen: Stamp a phase mark (boot/title/loader/gameplay) into the active trace.
rows.notFor: Querying marks — use trace_store_anchor_list.

rows.name: runtime_media_browse
rows.useWhen: List media available to mount in the active project.
rows.notFor: Mounting — use runtime_media_mount.

rows.name: runtime_media_list_paths
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.name: runtime_media_mount
rows.useWhen: Mount a .d64/.g64 to drive 8 (or .crt) in the live session via the 709 ingress service.
rows.notFor: Swapping a mounted disk — use runtime_media_swap.

rows.name: runtime_media_swap
rows.useWhen: Swap the drive-8 disk mid-session (checkpointed branch event).
rows.notFor: Initial mount — use runtime_media_mount.

rows.name: runtime_media_unmount
rows.useWhen: Eject media from a drive/cartridge slot.
rows.notFor: Mounting — use runtime_media_mount.

rows.name: runtime_memory_access_map
rows.useWhen: Legacy pre-facade variant; retained only for backward-compat tooling.
rows.notFor: New work — the Spec 725/726 default facade supersedes it.

rows.name: runtime_monitor_disasm
rows.useWhen: Disassemble around the live PC at a paused state.
rows.notFor: Static PRG disasm — use disasm_prg.

rows.name: runtime_monitor_memory
rows.useWhen: Read live RAM/IO bytes at a paused state.
rows.notFor: Static payload bytes — use inspect_address_range.

rows.name: runtime_monitor_registers
rows.useWhen: Read CPU registers/flags at a paused state.
rows.notFor: Memory bytes — use runtime_monitor_memory.

rows.name: runtime_profile_loader
rows.useWhen: Profile loader phases / hot PCs / IEC activity from a trace.
rows.notFor: Generic event query — use runtime_query_events.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: runtime_promote_branch
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.name: runtime_query_events
rows.useWhen: Query trace events by family/cycle/pc/addr against a trace.duckdb.
rows.notFor: Custom SQL — use trace_store_query only for one-off questions.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: runtime_regression_capture_baseline
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.name: runtime_regression_compare
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.name: runtime_render_screen
rows.useWhen: Render the current C64 screen as evidence of a visible state.
rows.notFor: Pixel→RAM resolution — use runtime_vic_inspect_at.

rows.name: runtime_resolve_pc
rows.useWhen: Resolve a runtime PC to a payload/source location for annotation evidence.
rows.notFor: Symbol/ROM lookup — use c64ref_lookup.

rows.name: runtime_run_scenario
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: runtime_run_scenarios_parallel
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: runtime_save_vsf
rows.useWhen: Legacy pre-facade variant; retained only for backward-compat tooling.
rows.notFor: New work — the Spec 725/726 default facade supersedes it.

rows.name: runtime_scan_fingerprints
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.name: runtime_scenario_delete
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: runtime_scenario_list
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: runtime_scenario_load
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: runtime_scenario_save
rows.useWhen: Internal dev: run/manage a built-in repo scenario fixture for regression/debug.
rows.notFor: External-LLM project work — start from user media via runtime_session_start.

rows.name: runtime_session_export_audio
rows.useWhen: Advanced: export audio/video/frame artifacts from a session.
rows.notFor: Normal screen evidence — use runtime_render_screen.

rows.name: runtime_session_run
rows.useWhen: Advance the live session (instruction budget or until a stable-screen/PC condition).
rows.notFor: Single-step — use runtime_step_into / runtime_step_over.

rows.name: runtime_session_snapshot
rows.useWhen: Capture a checkpoint of the live machine for inspect/rewind/branch.
rows.notFor: Durable .c64re dump — that is an advanced session dump tool.

rows.name: runtime_session_start
rows.useWhen: Start the Headless product runtime; pass disk_path/crt_path/prg_path + optional trace_out + trace_domains for durable capture. Disk-boot trace sequence: start(disk_path,trace_out) → session_run to BASIC READY → mark('basic-ready') → type('LOAD"*",8,1\rRUN\r') → session_run to stable screen → mark('loaded-or-title') → trace_finalize.
rows.notFor: VICE / scenario fixtures — those are advanced internal-dev paths.

rows.name: runtime_session_status
rows.useWhen: Read the live session's run state / cycle / media.
rows.notFor: Register dump — use runtime_monitor_registers.

rows.name: runtime_snapshot_tree
rows.useWhen: Advanced runtime-control variant (lifecycle/dump/breakpoint/watch/batch/regression) for debugging.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — the default runtime facade covers session start/run/snapshot.

rows.name: runtime_status
rows.useWhen: Legacy pre-facade variant; retained only for backward-compat tooling.
rows.notFor: New work — the Spec 725/726 default facade supersedes it.

rows.name: runtime_step_into
rows.useWhen: Single-step one instruction, entering subroutines.
rows.notFor: Stepping over a JSR — use runtime_step_over.

rows.name: runtime_step_over
rows.useWhen: Single-step over a JSR without entering it.
rows.notFor: Entering the call — use runtime_step_into.

rows.name: runtime_swimlane_slice
rows.useWhen: Get a bounded multi-lane (c64/drive/iec/$dd00) slice around a cycle window.
rows.notFor: Single-family event list — use runtime_query_events.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: runtime_trace_finalize
rows.useWhen: Drain + close the live trace into a durable trace.duckdb.
rows.notFor: Starting a trace — use runtime_session_start(trace_out).

rows.name: runtime_trace_status
rows.useWhen: Check whether a live trace is active + its queue/row counts.
rows.notFor: Reading rows — use runtime_query_events / trace_store_*.

rows.name: runtime_trace_taint
rows.useWhen: Track how a value/address propagates through the trace.
rows.notFor: Top PCs — use trace_store_top_pcs.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: runtime_type
rows.useWhen: Type text/commands into the live machine, e.g. LOAD"*",8,1\rRUN\r.
rows.notFor: Joystick/fire — use runtime_joystick.

rows.name: runtime_until
rows.useWhen: Run until a PC/condition (e.g. stable screen) is reached.
rows.notFor: Fixed instruction budget — use runtime_session_run.

rows.name: runtime_vic_inspect_at
rows.useWhen: Resolve a screen pixel/cell to VIC/RAM evidence on a paused checkpoint.
rows.notFor: Whole-screen capture — use runtime_render_screen.

rows.name: sandbox_6502_run
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: sandbox_depack
rows.useWhen: Operator/maintenance: repair/backfill/dedupe/register project-store records.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — never use maintenance tools to answer RE questions.

rows.name: save_anti_pattern
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: save_artifact
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: save_build_pipeline
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: save_entity
rows.useWhen: Record a named entity (routine/asset/struct) to link evidence to.
rows.notFor: Free-text conclusions — use save_finding.

rows.name: save_finding
rows.useWhen: Persist an evidence-backed conclusion (routine, protection, asset origin).
rows.notFor: Transient chat notes — persist only durable conclusions.

rows.name: save_flow
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: save_open_question
rows.useWhen: Record an unresolved question needing human input or later evidence.
rows.notFor: A settled conclusion — use save_finding.

rows.name: save_patch_recipe
rows.useWhen: Advanced change/patch-recipe + loader-event bookkeeping.
rows.notFor: Normal analysis — record conclusions via save_finding.

rows.name: save_project_profile
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: save_task
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: scan_g64_headers
rows.useWhen: Scan a G64 track for sector headers (incl. non-standard ones).
rows.notFor: Reading a candidate sector's bytes — use read_g64_sector_candidate.

rows.name: scan_graphics_candidates
rows.useWhen: Low-level disk-format / GCR forensics on an image.
rows.notFor: Normal file extraction — use extract_disk.

rows.name: scan_registration_delta
rows.useWhen: Low-level disk-format / GCR forensics on an image.
rows.notFor: Normal file extraction — use extract_disk.

rows.name: set_artifact_relevance
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: set_payload_disk_hint
rows.useWhen: Tag a payload with a disk-structure hint (drive-code/protected/raw/bad-crc/gap) so the disk heatmap colours it.
rows.notFor: Sector extraction — use extract_disk / extract_disk_custom_lut.

rows.name: snapshot_artifact_before_overwrite
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: start_build_run
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.name: start_re_workflow
rows.useWhen: Select the workflow/profile (crack, port, analysis, bugfix) for the project objective.
rows.notFor: Per-PRG static disassembly — use run_prg_reverse_workflow / disasm_prg.

rows.name: suggest_depacker
rows.useWhen: Identify the likely packer/cruncher of a payload.
rows.notFor: Actually unpacking — use try_depack.

rows.name: suggest_disk_lut_sector
rows.useWhen: Suggest the sector LUT a custom loader likely uses, to drive a custom-LUT extraction.
rows.notFor: Standard DOS extraction — use extract_disk.

rows.name: trace_store_anchor_find
rows.useWhen: Find a mark/anchor by label/cycle in a trace.
rows.notFor: Listing all marks — use trace_store_anchor_list.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: trace_store_anchor_list
rows.useWhen: List phase marks/anchors recorded in a trace.
rows.notFor: Stamping a mark — use runtime_mark.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: trace_store_bus_find
rows.useWhen: Find bus reads/writes to an address/range (e.g. $dd00, IEC).
rows.notFor: Top PCs — use trace_store_top_pcs.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: trace_store_info
rows.useWhen: Summarise a trace.duckdb: run, event/channel/mark counts.
rows.notFor: Per-event rows — use runtime_query_events.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: trace_store_query
rows.useWhen: Escape hatch for one-off custom SQL after the convenience readers cover the shape.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — prefer trace_store_info/top_pcs/bus_find + runtime_query_events.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: trace_store_top_pcs
rows.useWhen: Get the most-executed PCs (executed-code set) for a cpu lane.
rows.notFor: Bus addresses — use trace_store_bus_find.
rows.notes: Trace reader: consumes the live-writer schema (trace_run + trace_event(run_id,seq,cycle,channel,trigger_kind,capture_kind,data_json) + trace_mark(run_id,cycle,label)). MUST NOT query legacy meta/instructions tables (Spec 726 §6a).

rows.name: try_depack
rows.useWhen: Attempt to unpack a packed payload into a usable image.
rows.notFor: Identifying the packer only — use suggest_depacker.

rows.name: update_task_status
rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.

rows.useWhen: Advanced/auxiliary tool; not part of the normal workflow.
rows.notFor: Normal workflow — covered by the default facade.
